current_text: - **int64 Q24 SqReLU experiment (2026-03-07): NO IMPROVEMENT.** 176.59 vs 176.60. Extra precision through the squaring doesn't help — error comes from upstream accumulation across layers, not local precision loss. Reverted to int32. - **🐛 Exp LUT Bug Found & Fixed (2026-03-08) 🏆🏆🏆:** exp LUT returned 0 for inputs < -16 (exp(-16)*65536 = 0.007 truncates to 0). Violates exp(x) > 0 ∀x. With zero WKV state, channels permanently die. Rare tokens ("ür") killed dozens of channels → cascade through all layers. **Fix:** `if v < 1 { v = 1 }`. Result: **10.9% gap → 1.4% gap** (165.70 vs 163.36). Per-channel debugging found what aggregate metrics hid. - **ReLU ablation (2026-03-09): NEGATIVE.** Plain ReLU gap worse (28.5% vs 3.4%). Squared ReLU amplifies signal more than noise. Can't claim RWKV-5/6 improvement empirically — reframe as theoretical prediction. - **Text gen re-eval (2026-03-09):** Token agreement up from ~10% to ~27% mean (73% best). "Implicit regularization" story gone — integer now closely tracks float. Stronger result: faithful inference, not different behavior. - **Energy op count (2026-03-09):** ~184M int ops/token (12 layers). **1.44× ALU efficiency** (Horowitz 2014).
